title: Brazilian Apricot Stir-Fry
description: A sweet and tangy stir-fry featuring Brazilian spices and apricot sauce, served with crispy citrusy chicken.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together Brazilian spices, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
3. Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken breast.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
7. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of stir-fry oil.
8. Add the bell pepper and onion to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
9. Stir in the apricot puree, citrusy soy sauce, and velvety honey.
10. Return the chicken breast to the skillet and coat with the sauce.
11. Serve the chicken breast with the sauce spooned over the top.
